title: Local controllability of free boundary three-dimensional semilinear radial parabolic equations
summary: We prove that a free boundary semilinear heat equation with Stefan boundary condition and radially symmetric data is locally null controllable. The strategy involves reducing the problem to the corresponding one-dimensional formulation and adapting a Carleman inequality in that setting. The local null controllability of the free-boundary problem is then established via the Schauder fixed-point theorem. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first controllability result for this problem with Stefan boundary condition in more than one spatial dimension.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有Stefan边界条件的自由边界半线性热方程在径向对称数据下的局部零可控性
AI.motivation: 研究具有Stefan边界条件的自由边界半线性热方程的零可控性问题，这是多维空间中该问题首次获得可控性结果
AI.techniques: 通过径向对称性将问题简化为一维形式，采用Carleman不等式方法，并利用Schauder不动点定理建立局部零可控性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了具有Stefan边界条件的自由边界半线性热方程在径向对称数据下的局部零可控性
AI.significance: 这是多维空间中具有Stefan边界条件的自由边界热方程的首个可控性结果，为自由边界问题的控制理论提供了重要进展

title: Guaranteeing Higher Order Convergence Rates for Accelerated Wasserstein Gradient Flow Schemes
summary: In this paper, we study higher-order-accurate-in-time minimizing movements schemes for Wasserstein gradient flows. We introduce a novel accelerated second-order scheme, leveraging the differential structure of the Wasserstein space in both Eulerian and Lagrangian coordinates. For sufficiently smooth energy functionals, we show that our scheme provably achieves an optimal quadratic convergence rate. Under the weaker assumptions of Wasserstein differentiability and $λ$-displacement convexity (for any $λ\in \mathbb{R}$), we show that our scheme still achieves a first-order convergence rate and has strong numerical stability. In particular, we show that the energy is nearly monotone in general, while when the energy is $L$-smooth and $λ$-displacement convex (with $λ>0$), we prove the energy is non-increasing and the norm of the Wasserstein gradient is exponentially decreasing along the iterates. Taken together, our work provides the first fully rigorous proof of accelerated second-order convergence rates for smooth functionals and shows that the scheme performs no worse than the classical scheme JKO scheme for functionals that are $λ$-displacement convex and Wasserstein differentiable.

AI.tldr: 提出了Wasserstein梯度流的高阶时间精度极小化运动格式，包括加速二阶格式，并证明了光滑泛函下的最优二次收敛率。
AI.motivation: 研究Wasserstein梯度流的高阶时间精度数值格式，解决经典JKO格式仅有一阶收敛的问题，发展加速收敛的数值方法。
AI.techniques: 利用Wasserstein空间的微分结构（欧拉和拉格朗日坐标），极小化运动格式，λ-位移凸性分析，能量单调性证明。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 光滑泛函下加速二阶格式达到最优二次收敛率；2. Wasserstein可微且λ-位移凸泛函下保持一阶收敛率；3. L-光滑且λ>0位移凸时能量非增且Wasserstein梯度范数指数衰减。
AI.significance: 首次严格证明了光滑泛函下加速二阶收敛率，为Wasserstein梯度流提供了高阶数值格式，扩展了最优传输理论的计算方法。

title: The energy scaling behaviour of singular perturbation models of staircase type in linearized elasticity for higher order laminates
summary: We investigate the scaling behaviour of a singular perturbation model within the geometrically linearized theory of elasticity involving data of higher lamination order. We study boundary data which are of staircase type and show rather general lower scaling bounds, both in the setting of prescribed Dirichlet data and for periodic configurations with a mean value constraint. In contrast to the setting without gauge invariances, these lower scaling bounds depend on \emph{two} parameters -- the order of lamination of the boundary data as well as the number of involved (non-)degenerate symmetrized rank-one directions. By discussing upper bounds in specific geometries and for a specific constellation of wells, we give evidence of the sharpness of these lower bound estimates. Hence, it is necessary to keep track of the outlined \emph{two} parameters in deducing scaling laws within the geometrically linearized theory of elasticity.

AI.tldr: 研究几何线性化弹性理论中高阶层状边界数据的奇异摄动模型尺度行为，揭示了尺度律依赖于边界数据的层状阶数和对称化秩一方向数这两个参数
AI.motivation: 研究几何线性化弹性理论中奇异摄动模型的尺度行为，特别关注高阶层状边界数据的情况，旨在理解边界数据的几何结构如何影响能量尺度律
AI.techniques: 几何线性化弹性理论、奇异摄动方法、层状结构分析、对称化秩一方向理论、尺度律上下界估计、周期配置分析
AI.main_theorems: 建立了关于阶梯型边界数据的通用下界尺度估计，证明尺度律依赖于边界数据的层状阶数和对称化秩一方向数这两个参数；通过具体几何和特定势阱配置的上界讨论，验证了这些下界估计的尖锐性
AI.significance: 揭示了在几何线性化弹性理论中，尺度律必须同时考虑边界数据的层状阶数和对称化秩一方向数这两个参数，这与无规范不变性的情况形成对比，为理解材料微结构演化提供了新的理论框架

title: On non-uniqueness of solutions to degenerate parabolic equations in the context of option pricing in the Heston model
summary: It is known that the price of call options in the Heston model is determined in a non-unique way. In this paper, this problem is analyzed from the point of view of the existing mathematical theory of uniqueness classes for degenerate parabolic equations. For the special case of degeneracy, a new example is constructed demonstrating the accuracy of the uniqueness theorem for a solution in the class of functions with sublinear growth at infinity.

AI.tldr: 在Heston模型中构造了新的反例，证明了在次线性增长函数类中解的唯一性定理的精确性
AI.motivation: Heston模型中期权定价存在非唯一性问题，需要从退化抛物方程唯一性类理论的角度分析此问题
AI.techniques: 退化抛物方程理论、唯一性类分析、反例构造方法、次线性增长函数空间理论
AI.main_theorems: 针对特殊退化情形构造了新的反例，证明了在次线性增长函数类中解的唯一性定理是精确的（即该条件是最优的）
AI.significance: 为Heston模型中期权定价的唯一性问题提供了严格数学基础，深化了对退化抛物方程唯一性理论的理解，对金融数学中随机波动率模型的理论分析有重要意义

title: A quantitative Talenti-type comparison result with Robin boundary conditions
summary: The purpose of this paper is to establish a quantitative version of the Talenti comparison principle for solutions to the Poisson equation with Robin boundary conditions. This quantitative enhancement is proved in terms of the asymmetry of domain. The key role is played by a careful analysis of the propagation of asymmetry for the level sets of the solutions of a PDE. As a byproduct, we obtain an alternative proof of the quantitative Saint-Venant inequality for the Robin torsion and, in the planar case, of the quantitative Faber-Krahn inequality for the first Robin eigenvalue. In addition, we complete the framework of the rigidity result of the Talenti inequalities with Robin boundary conditions.

AI.tldr: 建立了Robin边界条件下Poisson方程解的Talenti比较原理的定量版本，用区域的不对称性来量化
AI.motivation: 研究Robin边界条件下Poisson方程的定量比较原理，扩展经典Talenti比较原理到Robin边界情形，并建立与区域不对称性的定量关系
AI.techniques: 通过仔细分析PDE解的水平集不对称性传播，利用区域不对称性作为量化工具，结合Robin边界条件的特殊性质
AI.main_theorems: 建立了Robin边界条件下Poisson方程解的定量Talenti比较原理；获得了Robin扭转的定量Saint-Venant不等式；在平面情形下得到了第一Robin特征值的定量Faber-Krahn不等式；完成了Robin边界条件下Talenti不等式的刚性结果框架
AI.significance: 将经典的Talenti比较原理推广到Robin边界条件并建立定量版本，为Robin边界问题提供了新的分析工具，连接了等周不等式、特征值问题和PDE解的定量比较

title: Global attractor for a Cahn-Hilliard-chemotaxis model with logistic degradation
summary: We consider a mathematical model coupling the Cahn-Hilliard system for phase separation with an additional equation describing the diffusion process of a chemical quantity whose concentration influences the physical process. The main application of the model refers to tumor progression, where the phase variable denotes the local proportion of active cancer cells and the chemical concentration may refer to a nutrient transported by the blood flow or to a drug administered to the patient. The resulting system is characterized by cross-diffusion effects similar to those appearing in the Keller-Segel model for chemotaxis; in particular, the nutrient tends to be attracted towards the regions where more active tumor cells are present (and consume it in a quickier way). Complementing various recent results on related models, we investigate here the long-time behavior of solutions under the perspective of infinite-dimensional dynamical systems. To this aim, we first identify a regularity setting in which the system is well posed and generates a closed semigroup according to the terminology introduced by Pata and Zelik. Then, partly based on the approach introduced by Rocca and the first author for the Cahn-Hilliard system with singular potential, we prove that the semigroup is strongly dissipative and asymptotically compact so guaranteeing the existence of the global attractor in a suitable phase space. Finally, we discuss the sign properties of the nutrient and prove that, under additional assumptions on the initial data, its concentration is uniformly larger than some strictly positive constant at least on finite time intervals.

AI.tldr: 建立了耦合Cahn-Hilliard相分离与化学扩散系统的肿瘤生长模型，证明了该无穷维动力系统存在全局吸引子
AI.motivation: 研究肿瘤生长模型，其中相变量表示活跃癌细胞比例，化学浓度表示营养物质或药物，系统具有类似Keller-Segel模型的交叉扩散效应
AI.techniques: 采用Pata和Zelik的闭半群理论，结合Rocca等人的奇异势Cahn-Hilliard系统方法，证明强耗散性和渐近紧性
AI.main_theorems: 1) 在适当正则性空间中系统适定性并生成闭半群；2) 半群强耗散且渐近紧，保证全局吸引子存在；3) 营养物质浓度在有限时间区间内保持正性
AI.significance: 为肿瘤生长交叉扩散模型提供了严格的无穷维动力系统框架，建立了长期行为分析的理论基础，对生物数学和PDE理论有重要贡献

title: Entire Nodal Solutions with Prescribed Symmetry to Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg Equations
summary: We establish the existence of sign-changing entire solutions to weighted critical $p$-Laplace equations of the Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg type. In doing so, we investigate classes of symmetry and show that, for suitable symmetry configurations, there exists a non-trivial solution which changes sign and respects the corresponding prescribed symmetry. In addition, we describe conditions under which these symmetry-types are incompatible. Especially, we demonstrate the existence of entire nodal solutions for an infinite number of distinct symmetry types.

AI.tldr: 证明了加权临界p-Laplace方程（Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg型）存在变号整体解，并研究了无穷多个不同对称类型的解
AI.motivation: 研究加权临界p-Laplace方程（Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg型）的变号整体解存在性问题，这类方程在几何分析和数学物理中有重要应用，特别是在涉及加权Sobolev空间和临界指数增长的非线性问题中
AI.techniques: 对称性分析方法、变分法、临界点理论、对称配置的构造、符号变化解的存在性证明技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在适当的对称配置下，存在非平凡变号解；2. 描述了对称类型不相容的条件；3. 证明了无穷多个不同对称类型的整体变号解的存在性
AI.significance: 扩展了Caffarelli-Kohn-Nirenberg型方程解的理论，为加权临界p-Laplace方程提供了新的存在性结果，特别是关于变号解和对称性结构的研究，对非线性椭圆方程理论和几何分析有重要贡献

title: Structure theory of parabolic nodal and singular sets
summary: We establish new estimates for the size and structure of the nodal set $\{u=0\}$ and the singular set $\{u=|\nabla u|=0\}$ of solutions $u$ to parabolic inequalities with parabolic Lipschitz coefficients. In particular, we show that almost all of the nodal and singular sets are covered by regular parabolic Lipschitz graphs with estimates, and that both sets satisfy parabolic Minkoswki estimates depending only on a doubling quantity at a point. Many of our results are new even for the heat equation on $\mathbb{R}^{n}\times \mathbb{R}$.

AI.tldr: 建立了抛物型不等式解在抛物Lipschitz系数下节点集和奇异集的尺寸与结构的新估计
AI.motivation: 研究抛物型偏微分方程解的节点集（u=0）和奇异集（u=|∇u|=0）的几何结构，特别是对于具有抛物Lipschitz系数的方程，包括热方程作为特例
AI.techniques: 抛物Lipschitz图覆盖技术、抛物Minkowski估计、加倍量分析、抛物几何测度论方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 节点集和奇异集几乎全部可由正则抛物Lipschitz图覆盖；2. 两个集合满足仅依赖于某点加倍量的抛物Minkowski估计；3. 结果对热方程也是新的
AI.significance: 发展了抛物型方程节点集和奇异集的几何测度论理论，为抛物型方程的奇异性分析提供了新的几何工具，对抛物型自由边界问题有重要应用
